## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Code lives in `05_pipeline_v3/<module>/...`
- [ ] Has at least one unit test in `05_pipeline_v3/tests/`
- [ ] Produces a deterministic numerical artefact (CSV, JSON) under `05_pipeline_v3/results/`
- [ ] Updated `01_docs/DoA_Research_Roadmap_v3.docx` if the scope changed
